section.heading: Continued availability of appropriated funds for direct real estate loans to farmers and ranchers

content.p: Funds appropriated for the purpose of making direct real estate loans to farmers and ranchers under this subchapter shall remain available until expended.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 87–128, title III, § 310, as added Pub. L. 91–524, title VIII, § 806(b), Nov. 30, 1970, 84 Stat. 1383.)
